name: Block Print Tile Peel and Stick Wallpaper Sage - Threshold™
description:
Customize your wall space with this simple yet stylish Block Print Tile Wallpaper from Threshold™. This peelable vinyl wallpaper features an allover block tile print for a lovely look that's perfect for livening up a kitchen, bathroom or a living room accent wall. The vinyl wallpaper has an adhesive back that makes it easy as can be to apply — simply cut the needed amount, peel off the backing and stick to the wall with none of the mess or fuss of traditional wallpaper.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
